sections.title: A: Complete using the verbs in the box
sections.instructions: Use the verbs in the box: apologise, defend, introduce, recognise, rent, respect, trust.

items.sentence:
'Who's that woman near the door?'
'That's Olivia Grant, the writer. Let me ...... you.'

'Hello, Max!'
'Wow, Emma! I didn't ...... you with those glasses!'

'I'm sorry I forgot your birthday.'
'It's okay. You don't need to ...... .'

'We're moving to the city centre next month.'
'Are you going to buy or ...... a flat there?'

'I told Jake my secret and now I'm worried.'
'Relax. You can ...... Jake. He's very loyal.'

'Mrs Lewis volunteers at the animal shelter every weekend.'
'I really ...... people like her.'

'I don't think Mia broke the window.'
'Why do you always ...... Mia when something happens?'

sections.title: B: Write one word in each gap
sections.instructions: Write one word in each gap.

items.sentence: Can you look ...... my dog while I'm visiting my grandparents?
Rachel and Ben split ...... a few weeks ago.
Liam and Noah have fallen ...... because of a football match.
Sophie was brought ...... by her grandmother.
Is Chloe really going ...... with Ethan?

sections.title: C: Word formation
sections.instructions: Complete by changing the form of the word in capitals.

items.sentence: I have a lot of ...... for my music teacher. (ADMIRE)
Jake is so ...... — he always forgets his keys. (CARE)
Nobody believed Oliver because he's such a ...... . (LIE)
Many ...... athletes compete at international level. (ABLE)
Ella said sorry, so I ...... her straight away. (FORGIVE)
My cousin has a funny and friendly ...... . (PERSON)
I don't have enough ...... to speak in front of everyone. (CONFIDENT)
People who are ...... often lose their friends' trust. (HONEST)
This castle ...... hundreds of years ago.
Spanish ...... in many parts of South America.
The classrooms ...... every afternoon.
The winners ...... next Friday.
The new shopping centre ...... at the moment.
The stolen painting ...... by the police yesterday.
These phones ...... in South Korea.
All the sandwiches ...... before lunchtime.
He ...... to hospital after the football match.
The email ...... this morning.
When ...... this building ......?
The concert ...... cancelled because of the storm.
The road ...... since last month.
These watches ...... in Switzerland.
A new sports hall ...... near our school next year.

sections.title: E: Complete the sentences
sections.instructions: Write one word in each gap.

items.sentence: We've known each other ...... we were children.
Daniel gets ...... really well with his neighbours.
My grandparents have been ...... for more than fifty years.
Sofia has a good ...... with all her classmates.
Mark is very ...... of his little brother and always helps him.
My cousins grew ...... in a small village near the coast.
Emily is an only ......, so she sometimes feels lonely.
Jake and his grandfather are very ...... and spend lots of time together.
They fell ...... after arguing about money.
After the argument, she felt really ...... .
Mia got ...... with her best friend again after saying sorry.
My neighbour ...... after our cat while we were away.
Lucas and I have a lot ...... common because we both love basketball.
She ...... him her best friend because they tell each other everything.
You can always ...... on your real friends when you need help.
